description_long: This object is a classic audio cassette tape, featuring a rectangular plastic shell with a central label area. The front face displays a white and red label with printed details such as 'STEREO', 'HIGH QUALITY', and '60', as well as an arrow indicating tape direction. Two circular openings reveal the internal spools, which would hold magnetic tape for audio recording and playback. The casing is primarily gray, with a slightly beveled lower edge and visible seams along the sides. The cassette is compact and lightweight, designed to be inserted into a tape player for use. Its construction is mostly plastic, with some internal metal components for the tape mechanism.
description: A rectangular, gray plastic audio cassette tape with a red and white label, visible spools, and printed details on the front.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile and rectangular shape of the cassette.
description_view_1: The front face of the cassette, displaying the red and white label, spool holes, and printed information.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, identical to view 0, highlighting the slimness of the object.
description_view_3: The back face of the cassette, similar in appearance to the front but without the detailed label.
